mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in unemployment rate above 5% indicates deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to reduced consumer spending and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and housing starts signals strong supply-side momentum, which correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.05 for any 3-year window, or 20d returns in high INDPRO/HOUST scenarios are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP growth acceleration above 3% indicates robust demand conditions, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI inflation reading above 2.5% triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite high CPI.

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly payroll growth above 100k signals a tightening labor market, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances with PAYEMS > 100k.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and housing starts indicates strong consumer demand, which correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.05 for any 3-year window, or 20d returns in high RSAFS/HOUST scenarios are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production below 110 signals weakening supply-side activity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite declining INDPRO.
